target: ACL27 supplement page 5 claim-boundary examples v2
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer checklist locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

layout_iterations.attempt: Increase the LaTeX include height without changing the standalone figure.
layout_iterations.result: Rejected: the figure was width-constrained in the page layout, so the PDF hash and page density did not change.

layout_iterations.attempt: Rebuild the standalone figure as a 1800 x 2320 v2 composition with a 15-tile audit strip, wider real-render source coverage, a v2 AI claim-boundary gate slot, and a compact footer registry strip.
layout_iterations.result: Accepted: the standalone figure becomes denser, the supplement stays at 45 pages, and page 5 active245 at 90 dpi improves over the round33 audit.

slot_postprocessing.source: The selected generated image was copied into the repository and locally adjusted with contrast 1.12 and brightness 0.93 so the gate schematic remains visible after supplement-page scaling.
slot_postprocessing.claim_boundary: The slot is exposition only and is not treated as experimental evidence.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the four evidence rows remain ordered and readable as lanes; the expanded cross-gate audit strip adds real render, VLM, material, and navigation anchors without introducing a new result.
visual_review.pdf_page_5: PASS: the figure, caption, and page footer remain within page 5 without clipping, collision, or float spill.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: pages 4 and 6 remain intact in the 45-page build window.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption states that the AI-generated claim-boundary gate v2 schematic is only for exposition and that the figure is not a new experiment, metric, VLM run, or navigation run.
